alternatives.name: Wrangler
alternatives.summary: Official developer CLI focused on Workers and related developer platform workflows.

alternatives.name: cloudflared
alternatives.summary: Official connector CLI for Cloudflare Tunnel runtime operations.

alternatives.name: cf-domain
alternatives.summary: Published Printing Press CLI focused on Cloudflare Registrar domain search/check/register.

gaps: Existing tools are product-specific and do not give agents a single plan/apply surface across Pages, Workers, tunnels, R2, Email Routing, tokens, AI Gateway, and cost signals.
Cloudflare API token permission groups are ID-keyed and should be resolved live instead of guessed by display name.
Agent workflows need redaction and explicit confirmation gates for token and secret operations.
patterns: Prefer plan-first commands for multi-step Cloudflare workflows.
Keep raw endpoint MCP tools hidden behind search/execute for the large Cloudflare schema.
Expose high-level MCP aliases for operations agents actually perform.

novel_features.name: Token recipes and diagnostics
novel_features.description: Resolve Cloudflare token permission recipes through live permission group IDs and report whether the current token can support the workflow.

novel_features.name: Agent-admin token bootstrap
novel_features.description: Create or guide a token-management bootstrap token that can mint recipe-scoped API tokens for other agents, with redaction and dashboard fallback.

novel_features.name: Project launch and preview
novel_features.description: Plan or launch a Cloudflare Pages/Workers project, including static output detection, deployment mode choice, and optional domain attachment.

novel_features.name: Domain connect
novel_features.description: Connect hostnames to Pages, Workers, tunnels, or R2 with product-specific API calls instead of dashboard spelunking.

novel_features.name: Worker secrets
novel_features.description: Set, list, and delete Worker secrets with redacted output and explicit confirmation gates.

novel_features.name: AI and agent infrastructure bootstrap
novel_features.description: Plan or create Cloudflare resources for AI agents and RAG stacks, including R2, D1, Vectorize, AI Gateway, KV, and Queues.
